articles.title: Curran & Pooran guide MI London past Sunrisers Leeds
articles.summary: A 19-ball half-century from Nicholas Pooran and an unbeaten 60 from Sam Curran guides MI London to a comprehensive seven-wicket victory against Sunrisers Leeds in the opening match of the 2026 men's Hundred.
articles.full_body:

# Curran & Pooran guide MI London past Sunrisers Leeds

## This content is not available in your location.

There was an error

A 19-ball half-century from Nicholas Pooran and an unbeaten 60 from Sam Curran guides MI London to a comprehensive seven-wicket victory against Sunrisers Leeds in the opening match of the 2026 men's Hundred.

MATCH REPORT: [All-round Curran leads MI London to dominant win](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/cricket/articles/cm2glr5v0glo)

_Available to UK users only._

*   Subsection [The Hundred](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/cricket/the-hundred) 

*   Published 2 hours ago

articles.title: Chelsea, Arsenal and Spurs all want Rashford - Wednesday's gossip
articles.summary: A trio of Premier League heavyweights all want Marcus Rashford, Arsenal are interested in Aston Villa's Ezri Konsa, and Nottingham Forest look set to sign a new defender.

*   Published 21 July 2026, 22:36 BST 

Updated 54 minutes ago

**_A trio of Premier League heavyweights all want Marcus Rashford,_**[**_Arsenal_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/arsenal)**_are interested in_**[**_Aston Villa_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/aston-villa)**_'s Ezri Konsa, and_**[**_Nottingham Forest_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/nottingham-forest)**_look set to sign a new defender._**

[**Tottenham**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/tottenham-hotspur), [**Chelsea**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/chelsea) and [**Arsenal**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/arsenal) are all plotting a move for [**Manchester United**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/manchester-united) forward Marcus Rashford, 28, but the Old Trafford hierarchy do not want to sell him to another English club. [(The I - subscription required), external](https://inews.co.uk/sport/football/marcus-rashford-transfer-latest-man-utd-tottenham-4657271)
